meaning: n.泥浆彩饰;adj.拖尾的, 曳尾的, 被拖动的, 蔓延的
examples: We were trailing by five points.
He left a host of other riders trailing in his slipstream.
A jeep trailing a cloud of dust was speeding in my direction.
Various surveys gave Mr Romney a 46-67% margin, with Mr Obama trailing on 22-25%.
Barack Obama didn't fare as well, trailing McCain by nine points among the rural voters surveyed.
